title: Alsine michauxii
taxonomy: Alsine michauxii is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is also known as Michaux's pearlwort. The plant is native to the southeastern United States. Alsine michauxii is a perennial herb with small white flowers. It is often found growing in moist, shaded areas.

intro: Alsine michauxii, also known as Michaux's Alsine or Michaux's wintergreen, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that may help to soothe digestive issues and reduce joint pain.
